subject: A small robed figure stands at the base of a massive ancient tree in a deep forest, surrounded by twisting roots and gnarled trunks rising into a green canopy
description: A dense storybook forest dominates the frame. A massive central tree rises straight up the middle, its trunk wreathed in twisting roots and side branches that arch like gothic ribs. A small hooded or robed figure stands at the foot of the tree, dwarfed by the scale of the trunk and roots, suggesting pilgrimage or encounter. Pale green light filters down from a small opening in the canopy at the top of the frame, casting a soft glow that pools around the figure. The surrounding trees lean inward, their bark detailed and craggy, creating a tunnel-like enclosure of organic architecture. The palette is dominated by mossy and emerald greens, with deep shadowed browns in the bark and roots, and a warmer pale-gold sliver of light from above. The mood is hushed, fairy-tale, slightly uncanny — the woods of an Eldraine-style storybook rather than a wilderness scene.
foreground: twisting roots and the base of an enormous tree with a small robed figure standing among them
background: towering trees and dense canopy with a small opening letting pale light through
emotion: small and reverent against vast scale; hushed pilgrimage
